title: Earlygame Lodestones
description: Changes the lodestone recipe to make it accessible to early game.
body:
Lodestones are gatekept behind netherite in the base vanilla game, making it rather inaccessible to newer players, and the general early game, despite being a great navigational tool.  This pack modifies the recipe to make it very accessible.  A recipe unlock toast is also included when a related item is found/crafted.
<details>
<summary>Recipe Spoiler</summary>

The lodestone recipe unlock toast is given when a compass is found/crafted.  The lodestone is crafted using a block of raw iron, surrounded by smooth stone.

![the recipe for crafting the lodestone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/827a9a46d217ba1f65d7b4c4fb953202a1217c34.png)

</details>
